subject: Social Science
learning_outcomes: Explain the causes and consequences of World War I
Explain the causes and consequences of World War II
Explain the role of India in the world wars

key_terms.definition: Military alliance of Germany, Austria-Hungary and Italy before World War I
Alliance of Britain, France and Russia during World War I
Hitler's ideology — Aryan racial superiority, anti-Semitism, extreme nationalism
Mussolini's ideology — nationalism, militarism, destruction of foreign powers
The mass killings carried out by Hitler against Jews
Policy of not joining any power block — India's foreign policy
Political tension between USA and Soviet Russia after World War II
Building in Delhi built to honor lancers from Mysore, Hyderabad and Jodhpur who captured Haifa

important_dates.event: Treaty of Versailles ended World War I
Atomic bombs dropped on Hiroshima and Nagasaki; World War II ended

mcqs.question: The correct group of countries belonging to Triple Alliance was
mcqs.explanation: The Triple Alliance consisted of Germany, Austria-Hungary, and Italy

mcqs.question: The treaty that ended the First World War was
mcqs.explanation: The Treaty of Versailles (1919) ended World War I

mcqs.question: The correct group of two countries that engaged in the Cold War was
mcqs.explanation: The Cold War was between the United States of America and Soviet Russia

mcqs.question: The Second World War ended in the year
mcqs.explanation: World War II ended in 1945 with the surrender of Germany and Japan

mcqs.question: The cities of Hiroshima and Nagasaki are in
mcqs.explanation: Hiroshima and Nagasaki are cities in Japan where atomic bombs were dropped in 1945

one_mark_questions.question: What was the immediate cause for the First World War?
one_mark_questions.answer: Archduke Franz Ferdinand, the prince of Austria, was assassinated by a Serbian citizen

one_mark_questions.question: What is meant by Holocaust?
one_mark_questions.answer: The mass killings carried out by Hitler are called the Holocaust

one_mark_questions.question: Name the fascist dictator of Italy.
Who was the founder of the Nazi Party?
What was the humiliating treaty signed by Germany after the First World War?

three_mark_questions.question: State the causes and effects of World War I.
answer: The Austro-Hungarian and Ottoman empires ceased to exist
Germany lost most of its territories
The formation of the League of Nations
The rise of dictators like Hitler and Mussolini

three_mark_questions.question: Explain the role of India (Mysore) in the World War I.
answer: The Maharaja of Mysore, Krishnaraja Wodeyar IV said he would stand shoulder to shoulder in the defense of the empire
He gave fifty lakh rupees to the war fund
He sent the Lancer Regiment to Egypt
He sent the Mysore army under the command of B. Chamaraja Urs
Lancers from Mysore, Hyderabad and Jodhpur helped the British in capturing Haifa
The British built Teen Murti Bhavan in their name
